# sweb Provider

Manage SpaceWeb (sweb.ru) resources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    sweb = {
      source = "sanchpet/sweb"
    }
  }
}

# Credentials resolve from config or the environment:
#   token            -> SWEB_TOKEN     (one-off, no refresh)
#   login + password -> SWEB_LOGIN / SWEB_PASSWORD (transparent token refresh)
provider "sweb" {
  login    = var.sweb_login
  password = var.sweb_password
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) API root override. Falls back to $SWEB_ENDPOINT, then the production API.
- `login` (String) Login for transparent token refresh. Falls back to $SWEB_LOGIN.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for transparent token refresh. Falls back to $SWEB_PASSWORD.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) API token. Falls back to $SWEB_TOKEN. One-off (no refresh).
